# AEEventHandlerUPP

**Type Alias**

Defines a data type for the universal procedure pointer for the `AEEventHandlerUPP` callback function pointer.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias AEEventHandlerUPP = AEEventHandlerProcPtr
```

## Discussion

For a description of an event handler callback function, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/aeeventhandlerprocptr].
